questionHtml: State the role of cholesterol in animal cell membranes.
markschemeHtml:
a. controls/regulates/reduces fluidity of membrane / prevents crystallization of phospholipids;

b. reduces permeability to some substances.

Do not accept ‘stabilizes membrane’.

meta.title: State the role of cholesterol in animal cell membranes.
breadcrumbLabels: B2.1.10. Fluid mosaic model of membrane structure
